commit.subject: LU-18598 osd: check obj is not destroyed in osd_ref_del
commit.message:
LU-18598 osd: check obj is not destroyed in osd_ref_del

Add check to ldiskfs osd_ref_del() for oo_destroyed,
so it is in sync with ZFS variant and other
dt_object_operations calls

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn env=ONLY=80b,ONLY_REPEAT=100
Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I82bdcdffabf00c4388fccaf27ec5a70a18293283
